title: Formatting, Style, and Editor Consistency · Repository Factory
summary: Create one fast deterministic formatting path for code and configuration. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a zero-diff formatting gate while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose a deterministic formatter and define supported file scope.
Separate local write mode from CI check-only mode.
Use editor-independent whitespace, newline, and charset settings.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.
